'''Yeshocq''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Yeshocq system/Legends|Yeshocq system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was a colonized, forested, temperate planet with a local year that lasted 13 standard months: the local year was divided into 455 local days. Yeshocq was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[qormot]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="COG" />
